title: myosotis palustris subsp. lamottiana
intro: Myosotis palustris subsp. lamottiana, also known as Lamott's forget-me-not, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the borage family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its antispasmodic and antitussive properties, which help to relieve muscle spasms and coughs. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, while also providing relief from anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of Lamott's forget-me-not include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
